title: astragalus palibinii
intro: Astragalus palibinii, also known as Tang-kuei or Huang-qi, is a perennial plant native to China and the Tibetan Plateau, belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Astragalus palibinii include boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue and stress, and supporting cardiovascular health, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Astragalus palibinii is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
